auth.onboardingSubtitle: Manage your weekly plan in one place and keep your water and weight routines consistent.
auth.loginSubtitle: Log in and continue your routine.
auth.registerSubtitle: Set up your account and start tracking right away.
auth.registerPhoneSubtitle: Start with your phone number. We will send a one-time verification code before creating your account.
auth.verifyRegisterOtpSubtitle: Confirm your phone number before moving to password and profile details.
auth.completeRegistrationSubtitle: Your phone is verified. Set your password and basic details to activate your account.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your phone number and we will help you reset your password with a verification code.
auth.verifyResetOtpSubtitle: Verify the code we sent before choosing a new password.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Verification is complete. Create your new password to finish.
auth.name: Full name
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.otpSentTo: We sent a verification code to {{phoneNumber}}.
auth.resendOtpReady: You can request a new code now.
auth.resendOtpCountdown: You can request a new code in {{seconds}}s.
auth.otpTimer: You can request a new code in {{seconds}}s.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been updated. Redirecting to sign in.

validation.password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.name: Name must be at least 2 characters.

success.passwordReset: Your password has been updated. Redirecting to sign in.

errors.phoneInUse: This number is already registered. You can try signing in instead.
errors.phoneNotFound: We could not find an account registered with this number.
errors.otpNotRequested: You need to request a verification code for this number first.
errors.resetOtpNotRequested: You need to request a password reset code for this number first.
errors.otpExpired: This verification code has expired. Request a new one and try again.
errors.invalidOtp: The verification code is incorrect. Check it and try again.
errors.invalidCredentials: The phone number or password is incorrect.
errors.registrationSessionExpired: Your registration session is invalid or expired. Please restart phone verification.
errors.passwordResetSessionExpired: Your password reset session is invalid or expired. Please restart the flow.
errors.invalidPhoneNumber: Please enter a valid Turkish mobile number.
errors.tooManyRequests: There were too many attempts in a short time. Please wait a bit and try again.
errors.firebaseVerificationFailed: We could not complete phone verification. Request a new code and try again.
errors.network: We could not connect right now. Check your internet and try again.
errors.unauthorized: Verification is required for this action. Please try again.
errors.loginFailed: Something went wrong while signing in. Please try again.
errors.requestOtpFailed: We could not send the verification code. Please try again.
errors.verifyOtpFailed: We could not verify the code. Please try again.
errors.completeRegistrationFailed: We could not complete your registration. Please try again.
errors.requestResetOtpFailed: We could not send the reset code. Please try again.
errors.verifyResetOtpFailed: We could not verify the reset code. Please try again.
errors.resetPasswordFailed: We could not update your password. Please try again.

notifications.subtitle: Shape reminders around the routine that fits you.
notifications.completeProfile: Complete your profile first to unlock notification settings.
notifications.heroTitle: Build a quiet but effective rhythm
notifications.heroText: Tune meal and water reminders to your daily pace.
notifications.mealEnabledHint: Helps you stay on schedule with planned meals.
notifications.mealAtTimeHint: Sends a second reminder right when the meal starts.
notifications.waterEnabledHint: Helps you drink consistently throughout the day.

plans.activeSubtitle: Manage your weekly plan with a calm, structured flow.
plans.overviewText: {{count}} meals apply today. You can edit the plan or create a new one.
plans.historySubtitle: Review previous weeks in a clean archive flow.
plans.historyEmptyDescription: Older plans will appear here once you activate newer ones.
plans.detailSubtitle: Review the plan in more detail.
plans.detailText: You can review every detail in this version, edit it, or activate it again when needed.
plans.mealListEmpty: No meals apply to this date. Meals assigned to other dates stay in plan details.
